rows.label: qev091804_MSG0001
rows.name:
Whoa, hey, lady. You look
ready to throttle somebody.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091804_MSG0004
rows.name:
Oh, don't play the sap! Either
you confess and I kill you or
I just kill you anyway.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091804_MSG0005
rows.name:
Wait, kill me?! What the hell, lady?!
I don't even KNOW this Dale guy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091804_MSG0006
rows.name:
My name's Dart! It's always
been Dart, I swear![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091804_MSG0008
rows.name:
Dale Gibbon may have been a
monster, but he definitely had
more guts than this sad sack.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091804_MSG0010
rows.name:
I'd have given her a piece of my mind
if I wasn't all alone out here...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev091804_MSG0011
rows.name:
So ex-cuuuuuse ME for being a
cowardly sad sack! Stupid lady...[ST:wait ]
